历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5039 → 4307 → 5760 → 6484 → 7421, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of approximately 3114 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7421; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 103 → 97 → 93 → 84 → 92, showing an initial decrease followed by an increase; in 2026, the Physics Category has 65 students plus the Medical Category with 22 students, totaling 87, a reduction of about 5.4% compared to 92 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable position in the top 20 in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative (51 incidents, 46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics and academic misconduct controversies; Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure; historical admission anomalies include a significant drop in admission scores across provinces in 2022, and a decline of 3607 places in the Journalism major in Shandong in 2023, with negative public opinion suppressing application psychology; it has 19 A- or higher disciplines including Stomatology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Nursing A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A, with outstanding medical and engineering strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively popular; in 2026, the number of regular college entrance exam takers in this province is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,552 compared to the total of 252,348 (Physics Category + History Category) in 2025, intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region, and Fujian candidates apply across provinces, with regional preference factors being neutral to slightly weak.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous declining trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-5.4%), the increase in local candidates, and the suppression of application willingness due to negative reputation incidents, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 7421; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7229, with a range of 6729–7729.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6729–7729, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6729), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>7729), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and appropriately lower expectations.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在福建省医学类单独招生，2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为4859、13211、12544、4780、21173，波动幅度极大。2021年位次4859，2022年大幅下滑至13211（扩招3 人），2023年基本持平于12544（扩招1人），2024年强势回升至4780（缩招2人），2025年又暴跌至21173（扩招6人）。总计划数从2021年的22人逐步增至2025年的30人。2026年 招生计划为22人，较2025年减少8人，缩招幅度约26.7%，为近五年最大幅缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家『985工程』、『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校名单。学校综合实力雄厚，医学学科是其传统优势领域，华西医 学中心在全国享有极高声誉，对福建考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争激烈。四川大学华西医学品牌效应显著，尽管地处西南地区，但医学类专业的全国性吸引力使得福建省 考生报考意愿不减。2026年医学类大幅缩招将进一步加剧竞争，预计位次将较2025年有所回升（更难进）。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，2026年四川大学在福建省医学类最低录取位次预测为16985名，波动区间为16485至17485名。2025年位次因扩招而异常偏低（2117 3），2026年大幅缩招将推动位次显著回升，但受近年位次波动剧烈影响，回升幅度存在一定不确定性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University recruits separately for medical programs in Fujian Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 4859, 13211, 12544, 4780, and 21173 respectively, showing extreme fluctuations. In 2021, the ranking was 4859; in 2022, it dropped sharply to 13211 (expansion of 3 students); in 2023, it remained roughly stable at 12544 (expansion of 1 student); in 2024, it rebounded strongly to 4780 (reduction of 2 students); in 2025, it plummeted again to 21173 (expansion of 6 students). The total planned enrollment gradually increased from 22 students in 2021 to 30 students in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 22 students, a decrease of 8 students from 2025, a reduction of approximately 26.7%, the largest reduction in the past five years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. The university has strong comprehensive strength, with medical disciplines being its traditional advantage. The West China Medical Center enjoys a very high reputation nationwide and has a sustained appeal to Fujian candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with fierce competition in majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. The West China Medical brand of Sichuan University has a significant effect. Although located in the southwestern region, the national appeal of medical majors keeps the willingness of Fujian candidates to apply undiminished. The significant reduction in medical enrollment in 2026 will further intensify competition, and the ranking is expected to rebound compared to 2025 (making it harder to enter).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Fujian Province in 2026 is 16985, with a fluctuation range of 16485 to 17485. The ranking in 2025 was abnormally low due to expansion (21173), and the significant reduction in enrollment in 2026 will push the ranking up notably. However, due to the severe fluctuations in rankings in recent years, there is some uncertainty in the extent of the rebound.
